news.title:
Bosch Ltd's board meeting on May 20, 2026, will discuss audited financial results and dividend declaration.
Trading window for insiders will be closed from April 1 to May 22, 2026.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd's board meeting on May 20, 2026, will discuss audited financial results and dividend declaration.
Trading window for insiders will be closed from April 1 to May 22, 2026.

news.title:
HDFC Bank faces scrutiny post-chairman's resignation over 'values and ethics,' raising corporate governance concerns.
Coal India plans SECL IPO, Wipro expands in South Korea, and Bosch forms JV with Tata AutoComp for EV solutions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank faces scrutiny post-chairman's resignation over 'values and ethics,' raising corporate governance concerns.
Coal India plans SECL IPO, Wipro expands in South Korea, and Bosch forms JV with Tata AutoComp for EV solutions.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd's board approved a 50:50 JV with Tata Autocomp Systems for manufacturing e-axles and electric traction motors.
The JV will have a paid-up capital of INR 94 Cr, with equal contributions from both companies. Bosch will focus on engineering, Tata Autocomp on operations.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd's board approved a 50:50 JV with Tata Autocomp Systems for manufacturing e-axles and electric traction motors.
The JV will have a paid-up capital of INR 94 Cr, with equal contributions from both companies. Bosch will focus on engineering, Tata Autocomp on operations.

news.title:
Iran war disrupts Indian auto parts exports; industry seeks govt help for financial support and energy access like LPG/PNG.
Auto component firms face 20-40% logistics cost surge; stocks like Samvardhana Motherson, Sona Comstar, Bosch down 4-11%.
news.summary:
Iran war disrupts Indian auto parts exports; industry seeks govt help for financial support and energy access like LPG/PNG.
Auto component firms face 20-40% logistics cost surge; stocks like Samvardhana Motherson, Sona Comstar, Bosch down 4-11%.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd shares dropped 5.8% to Rs. 33,305 after TREM V tractor emission norms were delayed to 2032, impacting near-term growth.
Delayed norms lower demand for advanced emission systems, slowing Bosch's revenue linked to tractor upgrades in India.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd shares dropped 5.8% to Rs. 33,305 after TREM V tractor emission norms were delayed to 2032, impacting near-term growth.
Delayed norms lower demand for advanced emission systems, slowing Bosch's revenue linked to tractor upgrades in India.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd appoints Mr. Tillmann Olsen as CFO effective June 1, 2026.
Current CFO Ms. Karin Gilges resigns May 31, 2026, for a global role outside India.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd appoints Mr. Tillmann Olsen as CFO effective June 1, 2026.
Current CFO Ms. Karin Gilges resigns May 31, 2026, for a global role outside India.

news.title: UBS retains 'Sell' rating on Bosch, raises target price to Rs 27,920.
news.summary: UBS retains 'Sell' rating on Bosch, raises target price to Rs 27,920.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd disclosed audio recording of Q3 FY25-26 Investors' Concall.
The recording is accessible on Bosch's website for public information.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd disclosed audio recording of Q3 FY25-26 Investors' Concall.
The recording is accessible on Bosch's website for public information.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd reports Q3 FY2025 revenue growth of 9.4%, reaching ₹48,856M.
The company targets a 55-80% dividend payout for the fiscal year.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd reports Q3 FY2025 revenue growth of 9.4%, reaching ₹48,856M.
The company targets a 55-80% dividend payout for the fiscal year.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd Q3 net profit rose 16.2% to Rs 532.1 cr, driven by demand for key components.
Revenue grew to Rs 4,885.6 cr; automotive sales up 18.5%, two-wheeler segment up 58.3%.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd Q3 net profit rose 16.2% to Rs 532.1 cr, driven by demand for key components.
Revenue grew to Rs 4,885.6 cr; automotive sales up 18.5%, two-wheeler segment up 58.3%.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd's mobility business grew 18.5% QoQ, driven by 2W and Power Solutions.
Revenue rose 9.4% QoQ in Q3 FY26, with EBITDA up 5.1% and PAT increasing 16.1%.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd's mobility business grew 18.5% QoQ, driven by 2W and Power Solutions.
Revenue rose 9.4% QoQ in Q3 FY26, with EBITDA up 5.1% and PAT increasing 16.1%.

news.title:
Bosch Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹6.1B from ₹5.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 12.5% from 13% YoY.
news.summary:
Bosch Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹6.1B from ₹5.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 12.5% from 13% YoY.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, with unmodified auditor opinion.
Management changes approved include Sanmay Dasgupta as VP-Power Tools and SMP from Feb 2026, along with an amended dividend policy.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, with unmodified auditor opinion.
Management changes approved include Sanmay Dasgupta as VP-Power Tools and SMP from Feb 2026, along with an amended dividend policy.

news.title: Bosch Ltd reports consolidated top line at 50,855M and bottom line at 5,748M.
news.summary: Bosch Ltd reports consolidated top line at 50,855M and bottom line at 5,748M.

news.title:
India mandates ADAS & DDAWS in commercial vehicles by 2027, boosting demand for safety tech & software.
Stocks like Bosch, Pricol, Tata Elxsi, and Sterling Tools to benefit from increased ADAS integration needs.
news.summary:
India mandates ADAS & DDAWS in commercial vehicles by 2027, boosting demand for safety tech & software.
Stocks like Bosch, Pricol, Tata Elxsi, and Sterling Tools to benefit from increased ADAS integration needs.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Nishant Sinha, VP of Power Tools, effective 14.01.2026.
The resignation, due to personal reasons, was disclosed per SEBI Listing Regulations.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Nishant Sinha, VP of Power Tools, effective 14.01.2026.
The resignation, due to personal reasons, was disclosed per SEBI Listing Regulations.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd clarified the recent volume movement in its stock is market-driven.
The company ensures disclosures per SEBI regulations and will report material developments.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd clarified the recent volume movement in its stock is market-driven.
The company ensures disclosures per SEBI regulations and will report material developments.

news.title:
China grants rare earth export licenses to select Indian firms, including M&M and Maruti Suzuki suppliers.
Bosch and Honda scooter suppliers among the approved, while most applicants remain excluded.
news.summary:
China grants rare earth export licenses to select Indian firms, including M&M and Maruti Suzuki suppliers.
Bosch and Honda scooter suppliers among the approved, while most applicants remain excluded.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd sees changes in market evaluation amid mixed financial signals.
The firm shows steady operational growth despite a complex valuation landscape.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd sees changes in market evaluation amid mixed financial signals.
The firm shows steady operational growth despite a complex valuation landscape.

news.title: Bosch to release its Q3 results on February 6.
news.summary: Bosch to release its Q3 results on February 6.
